channel.title: tcpdump on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in tcpdump on IT notes

item.title: ssh wireshark
item.description: To analyze traffic remotely over ssh: ssh use@server sudo tcpdump -U -s0 -i pflog0 -w -| wireshark -k -i - In case need an specific port: ssh use@server sudo tcpdump -U -s0 -i pflog0 -w - 'port 5984' | wireshark -k -i - To ignore trafic from ssh: ssh use@server sudo tcpdump -U -s0 -i pflog0 -w - 'not port 22' | wireshark -k -i - Or:
